title: AUTOMATE 2026 Set to Transform Chicago into Global Hub for Robotics, AI & Industrial Automation
description: AUTOMATE 2026, North America’s largest robotics and automation exhibition and conference, is gearing up to bring together the global automation ecosystem from 22–25 June 2026 at the McCormick Place Convention Center in Chicago, USA. Organised by the Association for Advancing Automation (A3), the event is expected to showcase the latest breakthroughs in robotics, artificial intelligence, machine vision, motion control, industrial IoT, and advanced manufacturing technologies.
